case_title: JEFFREY I. LEE VS. QI QUI

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-16-2012 - CONTINUED TO SEP-10-2012 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PARTIES DID NOT STIPULATE TO JUDGE PRO TEM.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEE, JEFFREY I. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT QUI, QI $5,766.00 PRINCIPAL, $130.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,896.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 ("BY FAX" ON PAGE 1 OF THE SC-100) FILED BY LEE, JEFFREY I. AS TO DEFENDANT QUI, QI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-16-2012 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-10-2012 - CONTINUED TO OCT-01-2012 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-01-2012 - JUDGMENT.
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEE, JEFFREY I.
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL - GRANTED - JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL -
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $55.00 - SERVED JUN-09-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT QUI, QI

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-01-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-01-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT WAS ASSISTED BY SHEILLA DIEP. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT QUI, QI
